title: Alternate 3D Crossbow
description: Give your crossbows some 3D flair! (firework rockets too :] )
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dWZd412d/images/32a0d0cefec2087cf55aaced0c18ed2a0506fbb9.png) ## If you like this pack, I highly recommend my new pack!! [Universal 3D Archery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/universal-3d-archery) --- **Works without mods!** Give your crossbows some 3D flair with this custom model for the crossbow, this includes a new 3D model for firework rockets as well since that is used by the crossbow :)! Resource pack contains only the crossbow textures, so it should work with any other resource pack as long as you make sure this is on top in the resource pack menu! report any issues you have on the website! --- please do not redistribute without my consent (feel free to use in modrinth or curseforge modpacks though!)
if you make variations from this please credit me :]
